prompt_used: Generate a complete HTML file for a web application that shows inflation data. It should fetch data from a public API, display it in a chart, and show the values in a table. Use vanilla JavaScript and Chart.js from CDN. Make it responsive and clean.

metadata.hardware: Intel(R) Core(TM) i5-10300H CPU @ 2.50GHz | 8.0GB RAM | NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1650, Intel(R) UHD Graphics
